response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior full-stack/web engineer with strong software craftsmanship, but his background is almost entirely web, product, and platform development. The role requires SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator performance work, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear in his experience. His low-latency DLang systems work and embedded exposure are tangential at best, and he shows no deep-learning workload or silicon-adjacent experience expected at principal level for this domain.
strengths: Deep low-latency systems experience (DLang, async I/O, fibers) handling millions of requests/sec
18+ years of broad engineering experience meeting the BS + 8 years bar
Strong testing culture, open-source contributions, and knowledge-sharing track record
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or hardware performance engineering experience
No deep-learning training/inference or AI accelerator workload background
Career trajectory is web/full-stack product work, far from principal-level hardware architecture
